name: Git Rebase Linux
description: Bash snippet that updates main safely, moves dirty main work to a branch when needed, rebases work from main, and restores stashed changes after a clean rebase.
content:
git_rebase_main_safe() {
  main_branch="main"
  remote_name="origin"

  branch="$(git branch --show-current)" || return 1
  if [ -z "$branch" ]; then
    echo "Not on a branch."
    return 1
  fi

  git_branch_exists() {
    git show-ref --verify --quiet "refs/heads/$1"
  }

  new_work_branch() {
    prefix="$1"
    stamp="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
    candidate="$prefix-$stamp"
    counter=1
    while git_branch_exists "$candidate"; do
      candidate="$prefix-$stamp-$counter"
      counter=$((counter + 1))
    done
    printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
  }

  update_main() {
    if ! git fetch "$remote_name" "$main_branch"; then
      echo "Could not fetch $remote_name/$main_branch."
      return 1
    fi
    if ! git show-ref --verify --quiet "refs/remotes/$remote_name/$main_branch"; then
      echo "Remote $remote_name/$main_branch was not found."
      return 1
    fi
    git switch "$main_branch" || return 1
    if ! git merge --ff-only "$remote_name/$main_branch"; then
      echo "main cannot be fast-forwarded from $remote_name/$main_branch. Resolve main manually, then retry."
      return 1
    fi
  }

  restore_stash() {
    stash_ref='stash@{0}'
    if git stash apply "$stash_ref"; then
      git stash drop "$stash_ref"
    else
      echo "Stash restore stopped. Resolve conflicts before continuing; the stash was kept as $stash_ref."
      return 1
    fi
  }

  target_branch="$branch"
  if [ "$branch" = "$main_branch" ]; then
    if [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
      update_main || return 1
      git status --short
      return 0
    fi
    target_branch="$(new_work_branch "work/rebase")"
    echo "Local changes are on main; moving them to $target_branch before updating main."
    git switch -c "$target_branch" || return 1
  fi

  stashed=0
  if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then
    git stash push -u -m "safe rebase from main" || return 1
    stashed=1
  fi

  if ! update_main; then
    git switch "$target_branch" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    if [ "$stashed" -eq 1 ]; then
      echo "Local work is preserved in stash@{0}."
    fi
    return 1
  fi
  git switch "$target_branch" || return 1

  if ! git rebase "$main_branch"; then
    echo "Rebase stopped. Resolve conflicts, then run git rebase --continue or git rebase --abort."
    if [ "$stashed" -eq 1 ]; then
      echo "Local work is preserved in stash@{0}; apply it after finishing or aborting the rebase."
    fi
    return 1
  fi

  if [ "$stashed" -eq 1 ]; then
    restore_stash || return 1
  fi

  git status --short
}

git_rebase_main_safe
